message_content:
From: YouTube Support <youtube-security@verify-acc.com>
Subject: Your channel will be demonetized in 24 hours

Dear Creator,

Your channel has violated our community guidelines. Your monetization has been suspended pending review.

Click here immediately to appeal and restore your account:
https://youtube-appeal-verify.com/restore

Failure to act within 24 hours will result in permanent demonetization.

YouTube Support Team
red_flags: Fake sender domain (verify-acc.com is not YouTube)
explanation: YouTube never sends account warnings via email with external links. The domain 'verify-acc.com' is not YouTube. Always log in directly to YouTube Studio to check account status.

message_content:
M-PESA ALERT: Your M-PESA account has been suspended due to unusual activity detected on your account.

To restore access immediately, verify your details here:
https://mpesa-verify.co.ke/restore

This link expires in 1 hour.

Safaricom M-PESA Team
explanation: M-PESA never sends WhatsApp links asking you to verify your account. Always check your M-PESA status by dialing *234# or using the MySafaricom app directly.

message_content:
Congratulations! Your account has been selected for the Instagram Verified Creator Program.

Claim your blue verification badge now:
https://instagram-verified-free.com/claim

This offer expires in 48 hours. Only 500 spots remaining!

Instagram Verification Team
red_flags: Instagram never offers verification via DM
explanation: Instagram verification is applied for through your account Settings > Account > Request Verification. They never send unsolicited DMs offering badges. This is a credential-stealing scam.

message_content:
KRA NOTICE: You have a pending tax refund of KES 15,450. To claim your refund, verify your KRA PIN and bank details at: https://kra-refund.xyz/claim

Ref: KRA/2024/REF/08821. Expires: 72hrs.
red_flags: Suspicious domain (.xyz is not KRA's official domain)
Requests sensitive bank details via link
explanation: Kenya Revenue Authority communicates via the iTax portal (itax.kra.go.ke) or official email. They never send SMS links requesting personal or banking information. Any refund would appear in your iTax account.

message_content:
From: Brand Partnerships <sponsors@brand-deals.co>
Subject: $5,000 Sponsorship Opportunity - Action Required

Hello Creator,

We represent a major brand that loves your content. We'd like to offer you a $5,000 sponsorship deal.

To proceed, please click the link below to sign the contract and submit your banking details for payment:
https://brand-deals.co/contract/sign

This offer expires in 48 hours.

Brand Partnerships Team
red_flags: No mention of specific brand name
Requests banking details before any negotiation
Unprofessional domain for a major brand
explanation: Real sponsorships involve direct contact, video calls, and contracts reviewed by both parties before any payment details are shared. Never provide bank details through an unsolicited link. Contact the brand directly through their official website.
